types: Giselle Ironwhisper's daughter is hospitalized after a failed medical procedure, forcing the Iron Fang Consortium to negotiate with a rival guild for a rare cure.
Brother Thane’s cult is accused of ritualistically altering memories in the Collapsed Plaza, sparking a feud with the Obsidian Lotus over ethical boundaries.
A merchant dispute in the Floating Bazaar escalates into a smuggling scandal involving Kharma and stolen Legend Points from a high-ranking Adventurer Guild member.
Elara Celestian’s duel at the Arena ends in a controversial draw, drawing accusations of favoritism from the Argent Blades’ leadership.
The Patchwork Saints are besieged by a collapsing building in the Northern Warrens, forcing them to barter for rescue gear with the Iron Fang Consortium.
Serpent Choir priests are arrested for embezzling divine contracts, revealing a shadowy network of bribes tied to the Sanctum Quarter’s temple vaults.
A mysterious spike in Kharma prices triggers panic in the Grand Forum, with rumors of a hidden cache of faith-crystals in the Archive Catacombs.
Captain Korin’s Wardens clash with a rogue adventurer group over a disputed territory in the Ashfall Terraces, raising questions about Tower Authority oversight.
A street performer in the Neon Row is found with blank eyes and a voice that repeats phrases from ancient scrolls, sparking fears of Veha’s influence.
The Adventurers’ Guild announces a new promotion system, angering veteran members who accuse the leadership of favoring corporate allies.
